$schema: Workflow Kit manifest — declares what ships with the kit vs stays local

plan-spec.reason: Rewritten with adaptive depth (light/standard/heavy). No external PM dependency.
plan-spec.reference_update: Replace /plan-spec with /create-plan in all skill files, CLAUDE.md, and agents.md

create-concept-brief.reason: Unified into create-note (type: PD). One skill handles all document types.

create-MN.reason: Unified into create-note (type: MN). One skill handles all document types.

create-pickup.reason: Unified into create-note (type: PIC). One skill handles all document types.

create-plan.reason: Unified into create-note (type: PLN). One skill handles all document types.

create-sd.reason: Unified into create-note (type: SD). One skill handles all document types.

create-spec.reason: Unified into create-note (type: SPC). One skill handles all document types.

design.reason: Unified into create-note (type: DD). One skill handles all document types.

structure.reason: Unified into create-note (type: SO). One skill handles all document types.

deprecation_context.update-skills: Replaced by update-wfk (same functionality, better name)
deprecation_context.update-workflow-kit: Replaced by update-wfk (same functionality, better name)
deprecation_context.yt: Replaced by video-intel (broader scope: transcription + project evaluation)
deprecation_context.pickup-triage: Merged into pickup (triage is now built into the pickup flow)
deprecation_context.wezterm: Terminal-specific automation replaced by iterm (macOS) or user's own terminal config
deprecation_context.plan-spec: Renamed and rewritten as create-plan, then unified into create-note (type: PLN)
deprecation_context.gateway-toggle: Deprecated. AI gateway now uses adapter-based routing with automatic provider selection.
deprecation_context.create-concept-brief: Unified into create-note (type: PD). All document creation now uses one skill with type dispatch.
deprecation_context.create-MN: Unified into create-note (type: MN). All document creation now uses one skill with type dispatch.
deprecation_context.create-pickup: Unified into create-note (type: PIC). All document creation now uses one skill with type dispatch.
deprecation_context.create-plan: Unified into create-note (type: PLN). All document creation now uses one skill with type dispatch.
deprecation_context.create-sd: Unified into create-note (type: SD). All document creation now uses one skill with type dispatch.
deprecation_context.create-spec: Unified into create-note (type: SPC). All document creation now uses one skill with type dispatch.
deprecation_context.design: Unified into create-note (type: DD). All document creation now uses one skill with type dispatch.
deprecation_context.structure: Unified into create-note (type: SO). All document creation now uses one skill with type dispatch.

note: update-workflow is NOT deprecated -- it is the developer's personal vault sync skill. It does not ship with the kit because it is personal, not because it is replaced.

schema.last_validated: YYYY-MM-DD, updated by orient on successful validation
schema.paths: object mapping logical names to relative directories under vault_root

skills.on_push: Only push core_skills. Strip hardcoded paths and org-specific references.
skills.on_pull: Detect user edits, offer to preserve as LOCAL.md, then replace SKILL.md + references/. Never touch evals/, *-workspace/, or user-added files.

templates.on_push: Push generalized versions. Strip org-specific bases, sections, or references.
templates.on_pull: Show diff. User chooses: keep local, take upstream, or merge.

claude_md.on_push: Push the repo's generalized CLAUDE.md. Never overwrite repo version with vault version.
claude_md.on_pull: Merge by section markers. Replace WFK:START/END blocks, preserve LOCAL:START/END blocks.

agents_md.on_push: Same as claude_md — push generalized version only.
agents_md.on_pull: Same section-marker merge. Never touch project-level agents.md files.
